title: ASR Outdoor Gold Panning 500g Portable Electronic Pocket Scale
description:
A convenient gold panning or gold prospecting tool to have on site in the field, the ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Portable Digital Pocket 5-Unit Measurement Weigh Scale with LCD Screen combines lightweight, compact and minimal design with high precision accuracy and functionality, that will easily fit in a backpack, jacket or bag. ASR Outdoor Gold Panning 500g Portable Electronic Pocket Scale

A convenient gold panning or gold prospecting tool to have on site in the field, the ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Portable Digital Pocket 5-Unit Measurement Weigh Scale with LCD Screen combines lightweight, compact and minimal design with high precision accuracy and functionality, that will easily fit in a backpack, jacket or bag. With automatic shut off, a bright digital display screen, tare, calibration and counting function, plus five different measurement units, this digital pocket scale will come in handy when gold prospecting in the field.

Key Features

  • PRECISE & ACCURATE MEASUREMENTS: The digital pocket scale features high precision sensors that can measure in five different units including grams, ounces, tola, carat and grains; its versatility here is ideal for weighing precious metals, gems, coins or stones, but also makes the pocket scale tool a great option to employ in other professional fields like a pharmacy, jewelry store, laboratory, grocery store, farmers market, kitchen and more
  • CONVENIENT PORTABLE SIZE: Measuring just 4.8 inches by 2.5 inches, the scale is lightweight and compact, making it easy to carry, pack or store in a jacket pocket when you’re gold panning in the field; if the pocket scale is being used in a residential or commercial setting, it’s small size easily fits into any drawer or can rest countertop taking up a minimal space
  • DIGITAL DISPLAY SCREEN, TARE & COUNTING FUNCTION: Featuring a backlit, high contrast digital display screen, you can immediately and clearly see the weight of precious metals, gem stones or other items; the digital pocket scale also features both easy to use and convenient tare or zero out calibration and counting functions
  • AUTOMATIC SHUT OFF: The digital pocket gold panning scale comes with an automatic one-minute shut off to prolong the battery life, conveniently saving you from having to change the batteries frequently if you, friends, family or colleagues forget to push the on/off button; also includes a clear plastic protection cover
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 3.8 inches x 9.5 inches x 6 inches; Capacity: 500g maximum; Measurement Units: Grams (g), Ounces (oz), Tola (tl), Carat (ct) and Grain (gn); Battery Operated: Two (2) AAA batteries required but not included; Weighing Base Diameter: 2 inches by 2.2 inches; Weight: 3.8 ounces; Color: Silver

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRPS5U1
  • UPC: 810058487551
  • Color: Silver
  • Size: Pocket-sized

The digital pocket scale features high precision sensors that can measure in five different units including grams, ounces, tola, carat and grains; its versatility here is ideal for weighing precious metals, gems, coins or stones, but also makes the pocket scale tool a great option to employ in other professional fields like a pharmacy, jewellery store, laboratory, grocery store, farmers market, kitchen and much more.

Featuring a backlit, high contrast digital display screen, you can immediately and clearly see the weight of precious metals, gem stones or other items; the digital pocket scale also features a convenient tare or zero out calibration button, counting functions and a one-minute automatic shut-off, making it an incredibly multifunctional weighing tool to have out in the field with you when gold panning if you happen to be lucky enough to spot a nugget or gemstone in your deposit!

Units/Max capacities/Counting Functions for all Measurements: -Grams (g)/0.0, 500g, 0pcs -Ounces (oz)/0.000, 17oz, 25pcs -Tola (tl)/0.00, 40Tl, 50pcs -Carat (CT)/0.0, 2500ct, 75pcs -Grain (GN)/0, 7716GN, 100pcs
